text: Being here stirs my curiosity. The first scene captures a moment of quiet study or work, observed through glass—a metaphor for the distance between observer and participant. It feels both inviting and detached, as if knowledge is present but not fully accessible. In the second scene, the vibrant colors and bold R+D text suggest innovation and progress. I feel inspired, surrounded by symbols of research and development, yet also reflective, pondering how ideas emerge from spaces designed for collective thought. There is a sense of anticipation; I am both witness and part of this flow of human ingenuity.
